title: Construction's Site
description: A simple modpack to make building more elegant.
body:
# Construction's Site

A simple modpack to make building more elegant.


## Added Things

- Building block mods
- The Create mod for contraptions
- Chisel & Bits
- Building wands
- House blueprints

## Why Would I Download
This modpack makes building easier, with more blocks and WorldEdit (//) including building wands! For small buildings, you can use the Chisel & Bits mod that's installed. World Stripper is included!
## Some Information
This modpack is for the Modrinth launcher! If it doesn't work, you can use other ones like ATLauncher. This modpack is for Fabric so the Fabric API mod is required.
